mano_cua.result_summary: Vue应用持续显示ElementAdmin Loading Screen，实际登录表单从未渲染。等待超2分钟、多次刷新/硬刷新均无法加载登录页面。加载界面状态下页面无法滚动。由于无法看到实际登录表单页面，无法测试登录页底部空白可滚动bug。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Vue app stuck in loading state, login form never renders. Cannot test the described bug (scrollable blank space at bottom of login page) because the actual login page never loads.
